title: boronia coerulescens var. spinescens
intro: Boronia coerulescens var. spinescens, also known as the prickly boronia, is a fragrant, flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in eastern Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Boronia coerulescens var. spinescens include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Boronia coerulescens var. spinescens is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
